seed_instruction: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting.
org_constraint: Use Markdown format, including one level-1 header titled "Resignation Letter."
new_constraint: The response must include at least two level-1 headers.
instruction: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting. Use Markdown format, including one level-1 header titled "Resignation Letter." The response must include at least two level-1 headers.
response:
# Resignation Letter

Subject: Resignation - [Your Name]

Dear [Boss's Name],

Please accept this email as formal notification that I am resigning from my position as [Your Job Title] at [Company Name]. My last day of employment will be [Your Last Working Day, e.g., Friday, November 15th].

I have decided to move on to a new opportunity that aligns with my long-term career goals. I want to express my sincere gratitude for the opportunities I have had while working here. I have truly enjoyed my time with the team and appreciate the professional development and support you have provided during my tenure.

During my final [Number of weeks, e.g., two weeks], I am fully committed to ensuring a smooth transition. I will focus on completing my current projects and handing over my responsibilities to the rest of the team. Please let me know how I can best assist during this period.

Thank you again for everything, and I wish the company continued success.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Phone Number]
[Your Personal Email Address]

# Next Steps

I have also included a brief outline of my transition plan below to help the team prepare for my departure. I am happy to discuss this further during our upcoming 1-on-1 meeting.<turn|>
